title: Black And White Shaders
body:
## 🎮 About this shader

This is a **minimal grayscale shader pack** that transforms Minecraft into a cinematic black and white experience.

All colors are removed and replaced with carefully balanced shades of gray, creating a unique, atmospheric and stylized look. The shader enhances contrast and depth, making the world feel more dramatic while still keeping lighting and details readable.

![Dark Oak Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1e896925d24486a022046339e5dc881bee346d9.png)

## ✨ Features

🎨 Full grayscale conversion \
🎬 Cinematic black & white look \
🌗 Enhanced contrast for better depth \
💡 Preserved lighting and shadows \
⚡ Lightweight and simple performance impact

![Nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/292a44bb028664516eed07619a4fb409f7a6e7d9.png)

## 🧠 Perfect for

* cinematic gameplay
* horror atmosphere
* minimalist visual style
* challenge runs or creative screenshots

![Birch Forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bc2458aaa4e1e4e5cb15c52c07407a344ff3541_0.webp)

## 🖥️ Requirements:
* Minecraft with shader support (Iris or OptiFine)
* A compatible GPU with OpenGL support

![End](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/731f28edf83405b96affe1724503da6dccfb2d6f_0.webp)
